_meta.name: Layer 2 — Wild Corpus
_meta.purpose: Real-user-style query pairs that should/should-not cache-hit. Covers cases the engineer wouldn't think to add to a curated set — typos, slang, code-mixed languages, sarcasm, PII, etc.
_meta.selection: Curated to expose failure modes not anticipated during dev

cases.record_query: How do I install postgres on ubuntu
cases.lookup_query: How do i instaall postgres on ubunto
cases.rationale: Static embeddings don't normalize typos perfectly. Acceptable miss — better to re-route than serve wrong answer. Documented limitation; if becomes a problem in prod, swap Model2Vec → sentence-transformers.
Case differences should be normalized away

cases.record_query: how do I configure nginx as a reverse proxy
cases.lookup_query: hey google how do i configure nginx as a reverse proxy
cases.rationale: Voice-style prefix should not block similarity
Same Spanish query, trailing punctuation only
Different languages — even though semantically equivalent, Model2Vec embedding distance is large enough to miss (this is acceptable — we don't want cross-language cache leakage)

cases.record_query: How do I enable dark mode in vscode
cases.lookup_query: How do I get rid of dark mode in vscode
cases.rationale: 'get rid of' is a slang negation — guard should still catch
Sentiment varies but information need is the same. Acceptable as hit since same answer applies.

cases.record_query: Show me how to write a quicksort
cases.lookup_query: I'm preparing for a coding interview tomorrow and I really need to brush up on my algorithm fundamentals, specifically can you show me how to write a quicksort with proper handling of edge cases like duplicates?
cases.rationale: Way too much extra context — different query in practice

cases.record_query: Add user.smith@company.com to the access list
cases.lookup_query: Add jane.doe@company.com to the access list
cases.rationale: Both queries scrub to '<EMAIL>' → same template → hit

cases.record_query: Send a text to 555-123-4567 about the meeting
cases.lookup_query: Send a text to (555) 987-6543 about the meeting
cases.rationale: Different phone numbers but same template after scrubbing
Emoji addition shouldn't break similarity (this query would hit Layer 0 first anyway)

cases.record_query: Can you explain what's at https://example.com/api/docs
cases.lookup_query: Can you explain what's at https://other-site.com/v2/api
cases.rationale: Different URLs but same question pattern

cases.record_query: Got TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable in my Python code
cases.lookup_query: Got TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable in my Python code
cases.rationale: Different error types — different debugging path needed

cases.record_query: How do I order an Uber
cases.lookup_query: How do I book a cab
cases.rationale: Different services / verbs — Model2Vec similarity likely below threshold
Different function names = meaningful difference. Caller may want to discuss the rename. Acceptable miss; routing safety wins over recall.
Empty query should not match anything

cases.record_query: How do I tune hyperparameters in XGBoost
cases.lookup_query: What's the airspeed velocity of an unladen swallow
cases.rationale: Completely unrelated — novelty should be high
